properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret used by the backend token provider.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of CORS allowed origins.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum failed login attempts allowed in the rate limit window.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.window-seconds
properties.description: Rate limiter rolling window size in seconds.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.enabled
properties.description: Enable the H2 database web console in development profile.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.path
properties.description: Servlet path for the H2 web console.
